_comment: Template config A1D Video Upscaler v2.7.0. Salin ke config.json atau biarkan app generate otomatis saat pertama run.

ffmpeg._comment: FFmpeg post-processing setelah A1D selesai upscale. Preset adobe_stock_4k_h264 memenuhi semua syarat Adobe Stock Contributor: H.264 High 5.2, 3840x2160, yuv420p, CRF 18, slow, -movflags +faststart, audio muted.
